description: End-to-end standard scRNA-seq pipeline in one command on raw counts: load -> QC + filter -> (optional doublets) -> normalize + log1p -> HVG -> (optional scale/regress) -> PCA -> (optional batch correction) -> neighbors -> UMAP -> Leiden -> marker genes -> save.
rules: fastest path from counts to a clustered, annotation-ready object; use the per-step perks to iterate on one stage
read-only input — writes processed.h5ad, marker CSVs (markers/), and figures under record_store
CONFIG is an optional JSON file overriding any flag (keys mirror flag names with underscores)
REGRESS_OUT is a space-separated list of obs columns; BATCH_METHOD is harmony or combat
usage: Set INPUT (raw counts). Optional: CONFIG, MIN_GENES, MAX_GENES, MIN_CELLS, MT_THRESHOLD, SCRUBLET=1, TARGET_SUM, N_TOP_GENES, HVG_FLAVOR, SCALE=1, REGRESS_OUT, N_PCS, N_NEIGHBORS, RESOLUTION, BATCH_KEY, BATCH_METHOD, MARKER_METHOD, SKIP_MARKERS=1. Output: processed.h5ad.
limitation: Requires scanpy installed (plus leidenalg/python-igraph; harmonypy for harmony). Without scanpy the porter writes a {} placeholder processed.h5ad and still passes.
